summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Eunoia V2 visual design overhaul. Backend APIs 100% functional (11/11 tests passed). V2 frontend features working excellently: atmospheric background system, hexagonal radar chart with 6 axes, JetBrains Mono font, split hero layout, concentric circles section, and 43-question gamified assessment all intact.

ui_bugs.issue: Overline text shows 'Peer support · Not AI therapy' instead of 'PEER SUPPORT · NOT AI THERAPY'

passed_tests: Landing page V2 design with split hero layout
Concentric circles 'How it works' section with SVG rings
Atmospheric background system (atmo-landing, atmo-profile, atmo-circles, atmo-companion, atmo-assessment)
Hexagonal radar chart with 6 axes (Anxiety, Stress, Burnout, Exhaustion, Loneliness, Accomplishment)
Profile archetype, summary, recommendation cards, citations, disclaimer
JetBrains Mono font for data/numbers (6 elements found)
Companion journal with reflection saving and qualifying count tracking
Get Help Now crisis button visibility and functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update hero overline text case to 'PEER SUPPORT · NOT AI THERAPY' on landing page. All other V2 visual design features working perfectly.
